name: Gundramon

signature_move.name: Gewaltschwärmer
signature_move.description: Fires a volley in all directions.

description: A large Digimon with a massive quantity of firearms. Possessing outstanding firepower, Gundramon, Magna Kidmon and Beel Starmon are collectively known as the " Three Musketeers " by many Digimon. Furthermore, Gundramon is part of the Crack Team , and is positioned for use in combat just like Mugendramon . It is faster than Mugendramon, and has high maneuverability such that it instantly moves within firing range. The burning smell of cartridges permeates through the 100% full metal comprising its body, so it is a bitter, hard-boiled Digimon. Its Special Moves are picking off the enemy's vitals with the six-chambered revolvers on both of its hands ( Der Blitz ), pinning the enemy to the ground with its feet and shooting them at point-blank range ( Platzenkreuz ), in addition, it has " Gewaltschwärmer ", a volley fired in all directions.
